title: Removal of Single-Stranded Extension using Mung Bean Nuclease
author: New England Biolabs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bb2riqd6

steps.title: Suspend DNA ( 0
steps.instruction: Suspend DNA ( 0.1 μg/μl ) in 1X Mung Bean Nuclease Buffer or 1X NEBuffer 1.1, 2.1 or CutSmart ®.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.0 unit of Mung Bean Nuclease per μg DNA.

steps.title: Inactivate the enzyme by phenol/chloroform extraction...
steps.instruction: Inactivate the enzyme by phenol/chloroform extraction or by addition of SDS to 0.01%.

steps.title: Recover the DNA by ethanol precipitation
steps.instruction: Recover the DNA by ethanol precipitation.
